title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 09 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 09/01/2024
Image reference: 2024-01-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-09-2024_img1.png
Bulkers
Bulker Values remained stable last week
Capesize BC Highland Park (174,100 DWT, Mar 2006, SWS) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 15 mil, VV Value USD 15.4 mil
Panamax BC Tomini Bravery (81,000 DWT, Feb 2015, Jinling Jiangsu) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 24.5 mil, VV Value USD 23.03 mil
Supramax BCs Xing He Hai & Xing Hao Hai (61,500 DWT, Mar 2016, Dalian COSCO) sold in enbloc deal to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 52 mil, VV Value USD 49.5 mil
Tankers
Tanker values remained stable last week, modern Suezmaxs expected to firm due to the sale of Bella Ciao
5x VLCC (297,000-321,300 DWT, 2009-2010, Daewoo & SWS) sold to Sinokor in an en bloc deal for USD 300 mil, VV Value USD 260.38 mil
Suezmax Bella Ciao (156,600 DWT, Jul 2020, New Times Shipbuilding) sold to Pertamina for USD 86 mil, VV Value USD 78.97 mil
Containers
Container Values remained stable last week
No notable sales last week
Image reference: 2024-01-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-09-2024_img2.jpg
